Instrument: Law 372/2005 on Energy Performance of Buildings (consolidated 2024)
Scope: Transposes EPBD: EPC regime, NZEB/new-build requirements, inspections, auditor accreditation and sanctions; EPC as compliance evidence.
Key Implementing Documents / Authorities: Mc 001-2022; EPC templates (MDLPA 2023); Order 2237/2010; QA sampling under MDLPA & ISC; official PDF (ISC).

Scope: Defines asset-rating methodology for EPCs, renovation assessment, RES integration and documentation deliverables.
Key Implementing Documents / Authorities: Monitorial Oficial 46/17.01.2023; MDLPA publication; professional training notices.

Instrument: Order 2237/2010 on energy auditor accreditation (as amended)
Scope: Grades, competence, renewal and QA controls for building energy auditors.
Key Implementing Documents / Authorities: MDLPA accreditation portal; national EPC registry; QA sampling protocols.
